zh.lifeSummary: 當Olof Hansson於1560年出生在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可特布時，他的父親Hans Örjansson25歲，母親Sigrid22歲。他和Cherstin Larsdotter至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可住了大約34年。他去世於1618年在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可特布享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olof Hansson于1560年出生在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可特布时，他的父亲Hans Örjansson25岁，母亲Sigrid22岁。他和Cherstin Larsdotter至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可住了大约34年。他去世于1618年在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可特布享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hansson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Anders, Erik, Niels, Elof, Gudrun, Jarl, Lennart, Mats, Niklas, Per, Sten.  Dutch Henrik.  German Hans, Elfriede, Kurt.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name   Hans  .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, or North German   Hanssen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Hans
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ananta, Bhim, Chander, Gopal, Madhur, Malkit, Nirmal, Preet, Puneet, Ravi, Rohit, Roop.  German Erwin, Guenther, Helmut, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Kurt, Manfred, Merwin.

German and Dutch: from the personal name Hans, a shortened form of Johannes (see John ). This surname is also found in France (Vosges, Alsace, Lorraine, and Nord). It is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an adoption of the German or Dutch surname.
Indian (Punjab): Arora and Sikh name, from Sanskrit hamsa ‘swan’ or ‘goose’.

nameMeanings.name: Olof
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Olaf . St Olof , King of Sweden ( d. c.950 ) was murdered by his rebellious heathen subjects for refusing to sacrifice to idols.

historicEvents.description: Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.
Treaty of Stolbovo ended Swedish occupation of Northern Russia.
1618-1648 Sweden fights in the Thirty Years' War.

en.lifeSummary: When Olof Hansson was born in 1560, in Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden, his father, Hans Örjansson, was 25 and his mother, Sigrid, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Cherstin Larsdotter. He lived in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden for about 34 years. He died in 1618, in Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olof Hansson est né en 1560, à Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède, son père, Hans Örjansson, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sigrid, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Cherstin Larsdotter. Il a vécu à Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède pendant environ 34 ans. Il est décédé en 1618, à Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olof Hansson 1560 in Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hans Örjansson 25 und seine Mutter Sigrid 22. Er hatte mit Cherstin Larsdotter mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er hat ungefähr 34 Jahre lang in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden gelebt. Er starb 1618 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olof Hansson è nato il nel 1560 nel Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia, il suo padre, Hans Örjansson, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Sigrid, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Cherstin Larsdotter. Vissuto a Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia per circa 34 anni. Morì nel 1618, nel Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Olof Hanssonが1560年にスウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスイッテルブインで生まれた時，父Hans Örjanssonは25歳，母Sigridは22歳であった。彼はCherstin Larsdotterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼はスウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスに約34年間住んでいた。彼は1618年にスウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスイッテルブインで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Olof Hansson(이)가 1560년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스 이터빈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hans Örjansson(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Sigrid(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Cherstin Larsdotter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스에서 약 34년 동안 살았다. 그는 1618년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스 이터빈에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olof Hansson nasceu em 1560, em Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia, seu pai, Hans Örjansson, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sigrid, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Cherstin Larsdotter. Ele viveu em Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia por quase 34 anos. Ele faleceu em 1618, em Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olof Hansson родился в 1560 г. в местности иттирбин, недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция, его отцу по имени Hans Örjansson было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sigrid, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Cherstin Larsdotter. Он жил в местности недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция около 34 лет. Он умер в 1618 г. в местности иттирбин, недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olof Hansson nació en 1560, en Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia, su papá, Hans Örjansson, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Sigrid, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Cherstin Larsdotter. Vivió en Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia durante unos 34 años. Murió en 1618, en Ytterbyn, Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia, a la edad de 58 años.
